objective: Upgrade the project version from 4.0.0 to 4.1.0 in pyproject.toml, glitchlab/__init__.py, and glitchlab/identity.py. Additionally, update README.md to reflect version 4.1.0 and add our two new agents to the Agent Roster table: 'Shield' (TestGen role, Gemini model) and 'Archivist Nova' (Archivist role, Gemini model).

plan_steps.description: Update version from 4.0.0 to 4.1.0 in pyproject.toml
Update version from 4.0.0 to 4.1.0 in glitchlab/__init__.py
Update version from 4.0.0 to 4.1.0 in glitchlab/identity.py
Update README.md to reflect version 4.1.0 and add 'Shield' (TestGen role, Gemini model) and 'Archivist Nova' (Archivist role, Gemini model) to the Agent Roster table

commit_message:
chore: bump version to 4.1.0 and add Shield & Archivist Nova to agent roster

- pyproject.toml: version 4.0.0 → 4.1.0
- glitchlab/__init__.py: __version__ 4.0.0 → 4.1.0
- glitchlab/identity.py: __version__ 4.0.0 → 4.1.0
- README.md: header + Project Structure label updated to v4.1.0; added Shield (TestGen/Gemini) and Archivist Nova (Archivist/Gemini) to Agent Roster table
- tests/test_identity.py: version assertion updated to 4.1.0
implementation_summary: Upgraded project version from 4.0.0 to 4.1.0 across all version-bearing files, updated README.md header and Project Structure section to v4.1.0, added 'Shield' (TestGen, Gemini) and 'Archivist Nova' (Archivist, Gemini) to the Agent Roster table, and updated the version assertion in tests/test_identity.py to match.
changelog_entry:
## [4.1.0] - 2026-03-06

### Added
- **New Agents**: Added 'Shield' (TestGen role, Gemini model) and 'Archivist Nova' (Archivist role, Gemini model) to the Agent Roster.
- **Documentation**: Updated README.md to reflect v4.1.0 and expanded Agent Roster table with new agents.
